text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Horsathon runner registration staff"… 
Ah, looks like it would overlap with 
practice time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"Line operator at a carrot processing plant"… 
"Cleat quality inspection"… Hmm, wouldn't 
want stiff shoulders with a race coming up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! "Short-term OK! Delivering Packages and
Smiles: UmaExpress, Temporary Courier". 
This is it! It'll even double as training — two 
birds with one stone!♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I might even be able to 
afford a trip to the amusement park 
as next month's treat for my sisters!♪ 
Big sister's got work todo!
